w:r.w:t: This Software Requirements Specification (SRS) defines the complete functional and non-functional requirements for TeachLink Africa. It is the authoritative reference document for product, engineering, design, and QA teams throughout all development phases.

TeachLink Africa is a premium two-sided marketplace connecting verified African teachers with local and international parents and students for private and home tutoring. The platform operates across web and mobile, supports multi-currency transactions, integrates live session infrastructure with time-clocking, and includes an AI-powered teacher upskilling academy. It competes directly with Preply, Superprof, AmazingTalker, TeacherOn, and Cambly.
Marketplace: Teacher discovery, vetting, booking, and payment
Session Engine: Live classes, time-clocking, recording, and assignment management
AI Academy: Six-module teacher upskilling programme (Google AI Studio / Gemini)
Parent Intelligence Dashboard: Real-time progress monitoring and AI insights
Reputation Engine: Ratings, badges, leaderboard, and trust signals
Funds held by platform until session completion is confirmed
International General Certificate of Secondary Education (Cambridge)
Integer-based currency storage (kobo for NGN, cents for USD/GBP)
Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard
Google AI Studio Gemini 1.5 Pro API Documentation
Firebase Platform Docs: Firestore, Auth, Storage, Cloud Functions
W3C: WCAG 2.1 Level AA Accessibility Guidelines
TeachLink Africa style.md Design System v2.0
TeachLink Africa Master Development Prompt v2.0
SSR web application, React components, SEO
Create profile, set rates, teach sessions, earn, complete AI Academy
Adult hiring teachers for their children
Search, vet, book, pay, monitor child progress, file disputes
Attend sessions, submit assignments, earn XP and badges
Approve teachers, resolve disputes, manage payouts, moderate reviews
All admin actions plus analytics, payout controls, platform config

All monetary values must be stored as 64-bit integers in minor units. Never use JavaScript floating-point for currency arithmetic. Convert to display format only at the UI rendering layer using Intl.NumberFormat.
Schools hire from platform in bulk
Referring teacher earns 10% of referee earnings for 3 months
System shall allow users to register via email and password
System shall support Google OAuth 2.0 sign-in
System shall support Facebook OAuth sign-in
Registration shall require role selection: Teacher or Parent
System shall send email verification link on registration
Full platform access shall require verified email address
System shall support Multi-Factor Authentication via SMS or authenticator app
System shall provide password reset via verified email
Account shall be temporarily locked after 5 consecutive failed login attempts
Teacher and Parent onboarding flows shall be entirely separate
Teacher onboarding shall be multi-step: Personal Info > Subjects & Curriculum > Rates & Packages > Availability > Video Intro > Submission
Teacher shall select multiple subjects and sub-topics
Teacher shall select curriculum standards: WAEC, NECO, JAMB, NERDC, BECE (Ghana), KCPE/KCSE (Kenya), IGCSE, A-Level, IB Diploma, SAT/ACT, Common Core, KS1-KS4 (UK)
Teacher shall set hourly rates in their preferred currency with automatic display conversion
Teacher shall set a discounted trial lesson rate
Teacher shall define weekly availability in 30-minute increments
Teacher shall optionally sync Google Calendar for availability
Teacher shall upload a 60-120 second video intro (max 200MB, MP4/MOV, stored in Cloudinary)
Teacher shall upload credential documents (PDF/JPG/PNG, max 10MB each)
Gemini AI shall analyse teacher bio and suggest improvements on submission
Admin shall approve or reject teacher applications within 72 hours via admin dashboard
Teacher shall receive email notification on approval or rejection with reason
Each teacher shall have a public SEO-optimised profile at /teachers/[username]
Profile shall display: video intro, name, verified badge, star rating, review count, earned badges, subjects, curricula, languages, location, rates, response rate, total sessions taught
Profile shall display the next available session slot without requiring calendar interaction
Profile primary CTA: "Book a Trial Lesson". Secondary CTA: "Send Message"
Profile shall include a "Similar Teachers" section showing up to 6 recommended teachers
Profile meta tags (title, description, OG image) shall be dynamically generated
Teacher shall be able to toggle profile between public and unlisted
Dashboard shall display: upcoming sessions, earnings summary, unread messages, pending assignments, and profile completion percentage
Teacher shall view earnings breakdown: total earned, commission deducted, pending escrow, paid out
Teacher shall view session history with clock log, recording link, and status
Teacher shall create, grade, and return assignments per student
Teacher shall generate AI-assisted progress reports for students via Gemini
Teacher shall view badge collection and progress toward next badge
Teacher shall view leaderboard position when opted in
Teacher shall manage payout settings: bank, mobile money, or Wise account
Teacher shall download payout receipts as PDF
Teacher shall generate and share an affiliate referral link
Parents shall filter teachers by: subject, curriculum, price range, star rating, badge type, language, location, availability, and teaching mode (online/in-person)
Search shall support sort by: Relevance, Rating, Price (asc/desc), Sessions Taught, Newest
Search results shall use skeleton loaders while fetching
Hovering or tapping a teacher card shall autoplay their video intro (muted)
A money-back guarantee banner shall be displayed on the search results page
Live social proof counters shall display: total lessons this week, active teachers, countries reached
Gemini AI shall recommend teachers based on the student subject, level, and learning goals
Booking flow steps: Select student > Select subject > Choose slot from teacher availability > Select session type (trial/standard) > Review cost breakdown > Pay
System shall display total cost with platform commission breakdown before payment confirmation
System shall support single-session booking and multi-session bundle purchase (8/12/20 sessions)
Funds shall be placed in escrow immediately after successful payment
Both parties shall receive confirmation email with session details and video link
System shall send SMS reminder to both parties 1 hour before session start
System shall send push notification 15 minutes before session start
Parent shall be able to cancel sessions subject to teacher cancellation policy
Parent shall manage multiple children under one account
Parent dashboard shall display: upcoming sessions, active teachers, recent history, pending assignments per child, total spend, and AI weekly insight
Per-child progress card shall show: attendance rate, assignment submission rate, average score, and score trend graph
Parent shall view all graded assignments with scores and teacher feedback
Parent shall access session recordings (where consent was granted)
System shall generate Gemini AI weekly digest email: highlights, improvements, focus areas
Parent shall view spend tracker: total paid, per-teacher breakdown, per-subject breakdown
Parent shall file a dispute on any completed session within 48 hours of completion
Parent shall download PDF progress reports generated by teachers
System shall support Zoom SDK embedded live sessions
System shall support teacher-provided Google Meet or Zoom link as fallback
System shall support Daily.co embedded video as a third option
Session page shall display: teacher thumbnail, student name, subject, and scheduled duration
Session page shall embed an Excalidraw collaborative whiteboard
In-session chat panel shall be available throughout the session
Teacher shall add private session notes and shared (parent-visible) session notes
System shall detect late join (15 min threshold) and alert both parties via SMS and push
Session clock shall auto-start when both teacher and student have joined the video room
Clock shall auto-pause when either party disconnects for more than 60 seconds
Clock shall auto-resume when the disconnected party rejoins
Live timer shall display in HH:MM:SS format on session page in monospace font
System shall log a full clock record: start, pauses, resumes, end - all timestamps in UTC
Billed duration shall equal total active time only, excluding all pause intervals
Teacher shall manually end session; system requires confirmation before closing
On session end, both parties shall see a summary: start time, end time, total billed duration
Clock log shall be stored in Firestore and accessible only to teacher, parent, and admin
Payout calculation shall use clock log billed duration, not the originally scheduled duration
Clock log Firestore writes shall occur server-side only; clients cannot write clock events directly
Recording shall require explicit opt-in consent from both teacher and parent before session start
If either party declines, recording shall be fully disabled for that session
Recordings shall be stored in Cloudinary with private signed access URLs
Recordings shall be accessible to teacher and parent for 30 days after session
Recordings shall be automatically deleted after 30 days
Admin may request temporary recording access for dispute resolution only
Teacher shall create assignments with: title, rich text instructions, file attachments, due date, and max score
Student shall submit assignments via: text response, file upload (max 50MB), or external link
Teacher shall grade with: numerical score, written feedback, and optional voice note (max 3 min)
Parent shall receive push notification when an assignment is graded
Assignment status cycle: Assigned > Submitted > Graded (or Overdue)
Platform shall track teacher assignment return rate (graded within 48h = on-time)
African currency payments shall be processed via Paystack (NGN, GHS, KES)
International payments shall be processed via Stripe (USD, GBP, EUR, CAD)
Funds shall be held in platform escrow immediately after booking payment succeeds
Escrow shall auto-release to teacher 24 hours after session is marked Completed with no dispute
If a dispute is raised within 48 hours of completion, escrow shall freeze until admin resolution
Platform commission (15-20%) shall be deducted automatically before teacher payout
African teacher payouts shall use Paystack Transfer to bank accounts or mobile money
International teacher payouts shall use Wise API
Teachers shall configure minimum payout threshold (default: NGN 5,000 or USD 20)
System shall auto-generate tax invoices per transaction for teacher records
Parents shall receive payment receipt by email after every transaction
Trial lesson refund shall be processed within 5 business days if parent is unsatisfied
Exchange rates shall be fetched daily and stored; display rates are indicative
System shall support cancellation policies: Flexible, Moderate, and Strict (set by teacher)
System shall prompt parent for a post-session rating within 24 hours of session completion
Rating shall cover 5 dimensions: Punctuality, Teaching Quality, Communication, Preparedness, Student Progress Impact
Written review of minimum 20 characters is required alongside rating submission
Displayed rating shall be a weighted average (sessions in last 90 days weighted 2x)
Teacher public rating displays only after accumulating a minimum of 3 reviews
Teacher may write one public reply per review
Admin may remove reviews that violate platform policies
ID and credentials approved by admin
90% of messages replied within 1 hour over last 30 days
100% assignment return rate over last 20 assignments
Active (1+ session) for 30 consecutive calendar days
Sessions with students in 3+ different countries
All 6 AI Academy modules completed with passing score
Platform shall maintain weekly, monthly, and all-time leaderboards per subject and per country
Ranking formula: total sessions (40%) + average rating (35%) + response rate (15%) + badge count (10%)
Teachers shall opt in or out of leaderboard visibility at any time
Top 3 teachers on weekly leaderboard receive "Featured" badge and homepage placement
Leaderboard snapshots shall be regenerated every 24 hours at midnight UTC
Academy shall deliver 6 modules as video lessons with module quizzes
Module 1: Digital Classroom Setup (Google Classroom, Zoom, Notion)
Module 2: AI-Powered Lesson Planning (Gemini, ChatGPT, Canva AI)
Module 3: Video Content for Teaching (Loom, CapCut, HeyGen)
Each module quiz shall have minimum 5 questions; pass mark is 70%
Completion shall generate a PDF certificate with teacher name, date, and QR verification code
Certificate shall be shareable as a LinkedIn badge image
Gemini shall power interactive AI roleplay teaching scenarios per module
Academy completion unlocks "AI-Certified" badge and boosts search ranking one tier
Academy access requires monthly subscription payment or premium teacher tier
Search results first render (first card visible)
Push notification delivery after trigger event
Video intro autoplay start after hover/tap
All data in transit shall be encrypted via TLS 1.3 or higher
All Firestore data at rest shall be encrypted via AES-256 (Firebase default)
Firebase Auth JWT tokens shall be validated on every API call
Firestore security rules shall enforce row-level access per user role
Payment card data shall never touch platform servers; handled by Paystack/Stripe PCI DSS infrastructure
Recording access URLs shall be signed and expire after 7 days
MFA shall be available for all user roles
Admin panel shall be accessible from approved IP ranges only
All user input shall be server-side sanitised to prevent XSS and SQL injection
Gemini API key shall only exist server-side; never bundled in client JavaScript
Platform shall undergo quarterly penetration testing from Phase 2 onwards
Platform shall comply with NDPR for all Nigerian user data
Platform shall comply with GDPR for all EU-resident users
Privacy Center shall offer data download and deletion request capability
Cookie consent banner shall display before any non-essential cookies are set
All financial transaction records shall be stored for minimum 7 years
Recording consent shall be logged with: timestamp, user ID, and session ID
Personal data shall not be shared with third parties without explicit user consent
Privacy policy and terms of service shall be version-controlled with visible changelog
All UI text shall meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA colour contrast ratios (4.5:1 body, 3:1 large text)
All interactive elements shall have a visible 2px focus indicator
All images shall include descriptive alt text
Touch targets shall be a minimum of 44x44 pixels
All form fields shall have visible persistent labels (not placeholder-only)
Platform shall honour the prefers-reduced-motion browser setting by disabling animations
All video content (lessons, session recordings) shall include closed captions
Entire platform shall be navigable via keyboard alone
Firestore horizontal scaling supports growth without architectural changes.
All media assets served via CDN (Cloudinary CDN / Firebase CDN) for global latency reduction.
Firebase Cloud Functions process all webhooks, payouts, and scheduled jobs asynchronously.
Backend architecture supports React Native mobile app (Phase 6) without changes.
Gemini API usage shall be rate-limited and batched to stay within Google AI Studio quotas.
Default language: English. Planned: French (Phase 6), Swahili, Yoruba, Hausa (later phases).
All timestamps stored in UTC; displayed in the user's detected local timezone.
Platform shall support RTL text rendering for future Arabic language support.
All collections use Firestore document-based NoSQL storage. Firestore Row-Level Security rules must be applied to every collection.
uid, role, email, displayName, country, createdAt, lastLoginAt, mfaEnabled, status
uid, bio, subjects[], curricula[], languages[], rates{}, availability{}, videoIntroUrl, credentials[], verified, badges[], stats{}, leaderboardOptIn, stripeAccountId, paystackRecipientId
Public read; owner write; admin write
uid, parentUid, name, dob, subjects[], xp, badges[], progressBySubject{}
Parent read/write; teacher read for own students
id, teacherId, studentId, parentId, subject, curriculum, status, scheduledStart, scheduledEnd, actualStart, actualEnd, billedDuration, clockLog[], zoomLink, recordingUrl, recordingConsent{}, notes{}
Teacher + parent read/write; admin read all
id, sessionId, teacherId, studentId, title, instructions, attachments[], dueDate, maxScore, submission{}, grade{}, status
Teacher write; student submit; parent read
id, sessionId, parentId, teacherId, overallRating, dimensions{}, comment, teacherReply, createdAt, reported
Public read; parent create; teacher reply; admin delete
id, amount, amountMinorUnits, currency, commission, status, fromUserId, toUserId, sessionId, paymentProcessor, processorRef, payoutStatus, receiptUrl, createdAt
id, userId, type, title, body, read, createdAt
userId, moduleId, status, score, completedAt, certificateUrl, attempts
id, sessionId, raisedByUserId, reason, evidence[], status, adminId, resolution, adminNotes, createdAt, resolvedAt
id, period{type,start,end}, subject, country, rankings[], generatedAt
All monetary fields in transactions and rates collections must be stored as 64-bit integer minor units only. Display conversion happens at render time.
getDoc, setDoc, updateDoc, query, onSnapshot, batch writes
Bio optimiser, progress insights, academy roleplay, teacher matching
Video intro hosting and recording storage
The GEMINI_API_KEY must only exist in Firebase Cloud Functions environment config. It must never appear in client-side JavaScript bundles or be readable via browser DevTools Network tab.
Landing page (trust-first), teacher onboarding, SEO profile pages, parent search and filter, booking flow, Paystack + Stripe payments, email notifications, admin dashboard v1
50 teacher signups, 20 completed bookings, zero critical payment bugs, Lighthouse SEO >= 90
Zoom SDK, session clock with full logging, recording consent and Cloudinary storage, assignment creation/grading, payout system via Paystack Transfer and Wise API, SMS/push notifications
100+ sessions clocked, billed time accuracy >99%, payout success rate >98%, recording consent logged 100%
Post-session rating flow (5 dimensions), review system with teacher reply, all 10 badges wired, leaderboard engine, trust signals on all search and profile surfaces
Review submission rate >60%, all badges triggering correctly, leaderboard refreshing daily, no false badge awards
Progress dashboard per child, attendance tracker, assignment grade log, score trend graphs, Gemini AI weekly digest, student XP system, dispute filing center
Parent dashboard DAU >30% of active parents, NPS score >50, Gemini digest open rate >40%
6 modules with video and quizzes, certificate generation with QR code, Gemini roleplay scenarios, AI-Certified badge, academy subscription payment, community discussion forum
Academy completion rate >40%, 200+ certificates awarded, AI-Certified badge boosting teacher search clicks >15%
React Native mobile app (iOS + Android), group classes (up to 10 students), subscription bundle packs, school B2B API, affiliate program, French language UI, GDPR privacy center
Mobile app 1,000+ installs in month 1, B2B 5+ school contracts signed, French UI launch with 100+ Francophone teachers
A teacher completes full onboarding (all steps) in under 10 minutes without encountering any errors.
A parent can search, view a teacher profile, and complete a booking with payment in under 5 minutes.
Payment confirmation email is received by both parties within 60 seconds of successful payment.
Admin can approve or reject a teacher application from the admin dashboard with reason logged.
Teacher profile page achieves a Google Lighthouse SEO score of 90 or above.
All form validation errors display clear, specific, actionable messages.
Platform renders correctly on mobile at 375px width with no horizontal scrollbar.
All payments process in test mode with zero failed transactions on valid cards.
Session clock starts within 5 seconds of both parties joining the video room.
Clock pauses within 10 seconds of a participant disconnecting.
Billed duration matches clock log total active time to within 1 second precision.
Recording is accessible via private URL within 5 minutes of session ending.
Recording URL is inaccessible (returns 403) after 30 days.
Teacher payout triggers automatically 24 hours after session completion with no dispute filed.
Assignment grade notification reaches parent within 60 seconds of teacher submitting grade.
Clock log entries cannot be created or modified by client-side code (Firestore rules verified).
All pages pass WCAG 2.1 AA compliance check via axe-core audit tool with zero critical violations.
No Personally Identifiable Information (PII) appears in browser console logs or network request logs.
All Firestore security rules pass a full rules unit test suite: unauthenticated users cannot read or write protected collections.
All API keys and secrets are stored as environment variables and absent from the git repository (verified via git-secrets scan).
GEMINI_API_KEY is not present in any client-side JavaScript bundle (verified via webpack bundle analysis).
All currency calculations produce results equal to manual minor-unit calculation with zero rounding error on a test suite of 1,000 transactions.
Platform achieves Core Web Vitals "Good" rating (LCP <2.5s, FID <100ms, CLS <0.1) on mobile 4G simulation.
Zoom SDK licensing cost escalates at scale
Evaluate Daily.co as primary embedded option. Negotiate Zoom ISV agreement at Phase 3. Allow teacher-provided Zoom/Meet link as perpetual free fallback.
Paystack rate limits during peak booking periods
Queue payment processing via Firebase Cloud Functions with retry logic and exponential backoff. Alert admin on 3 consecutive failures.
Rate-limit Gemini calls per user per day. Cache repeatable outputs (e.g. progress digests) for 24 hours. Monitor via AI Studio dashboard.
Clock log writes are server-side Firebase Cloud Functions only. Client cannot write clock events directly. Admin can review anomalous sessions. Gemini pattern detection on outliers.
Low teacher quality damaging platform reputation
Mandatory multi-step verification + admin approval. Minimum 3 reviews before public rating displays. 48-hour dispute window with escrow freeze. Fast resolution policy.
Exchange rate volatility affecting teacher earnings
Rates are indicative only. Teachers billed in their preferred currency. Daily rate refresh. Volatility disclaimer in teacher onboarding terms.
Privacy-by-design from Phase 1. Legal review before launch. Privacy center with data request forms. Compliance consultant sign-off before public launch.
Wise API payout failure for international teachers
Manual payout fallback via admin panel. Teacher wallet safely holds funds. Wise webhook monitoring. Email alert to admin on any payout failure within 5 minutes.
Firebase Firestore hot-spot contention at scale
Shard leaderboard and transaction collections. Avoid sequential document IDs. Use distributed counter pattern for session stats.
Every new page or feature release must pass this checklist before going live:
Primary CTA reads "Book a Trial Lesson" on all teacher-facing pages (not "Book" or "Get Started")
Trust bar (Verified · Escrow Protection · Money-Back · NDPR/GDPR) visible above fold on every page
Money-back guarantee stated within 2 viewport scrolls of any teacher profile
Star rating and review count displayed at font-size >= 20px on teacher profile
Teacher response rate and average response time visible on profile page
"Next available slot" shown on profile without requiring any calendar interaction
Social proof counters are populated from live data, not hardcoded copy
Teacher video intro autoplays muted on card hover and profile load
"Similar Teachers" section renders at the bottom of every profile page
All multi-step onboarding flows display a progress bar with completion percentage
Appendix B: Gemini API Usage Guidelines
All calls to the Gemini 1.5 Pro model are server-side via Firebase Cloud Functions only.
System: profile copywriter for elite teacher marketplace + raw bio text
System: educational analyst + structured student data JSON
Grades, attendance, assignment scores structured JSON
System: student aged [X] + teacher prompt input
Student profile JSON + top 20 teacher profiles JSON
Appendix C: Firestore Security Rules Reference
Simplified example rules. Full rules file lives in /firestore.rules in the repository.
match /teachers/{id} { allow read: if true; allow write: if request.auth.uid == id; }
match /sessions/{id} { allow read: if request.auth.uid == resource.data.teacherId || request.auth.uid == resource.data.parentId; }
match /reviews/{id} { allow read: if true; allow create: if request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.parentId; }
Clock log entries in sessions documents must be written by Firebase Cloud Functions only. Firestore rules must reject any client attempting to write clockLog[] directly.
TeachLink Africa • SRS v2.0 • Confidential • June 2026
